summary: Created Panel 1 (The Thesis) for H., synthesizing a founding-minded AI builder with proven production impact while documenting key trade-offs in AI reliability specifics.
learnings: Thesis structure effectively balances strength statements with honest trade-offs
Evidence citation format [Evidence: source] provides clear audit trail
4-sentence constraint (75-125 words) forces precision while maintaining comprehensiveness
notes_for_orchestrator: Thesis panel successfully synthesized candidate into a clear 80/20 narrative. Trade-offs (AI reliability, SOC 2 details) are explicitly named, maintaining credibility. All rubric criteria met. Ready for D2.2-D2.4 parallel execution.
